zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Coxsune於1540年5月7日出生在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 阿爾格時，她的父親Edward Coxsune24歲，母親Joan Coxsune25歲。她於1560年10月27日與Sir George Moore I在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 阿爾格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世在英國肯特坎特布瑞，埋葬在英國肯特貝黑斯達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Coxsune于1540年5月7日出生在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 阿爾格时，她的父亲Edward Coxsune24岁，母亲Joan Coxsune25岁。她于1560年10月27日与Sir George Moore I在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 阿爾格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世在英国肯特坎特布瑞，埋葬在英国肯特貝黑斯達。

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Coxsune was born on 7 May 1540, in Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, England, her father, Edward Coxsune, was 24 and her mother, Joan Coxsune, was 25. She married Sir George Moore I on 27 October 1560, in Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in Canterbury, Kent, England, and was buried in Bethersden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Coxsune est née le 7 mai 1540, à Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Edward Coxsune, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Coxsune, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Moore I le 27 octobre 1560, à Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre.

Oktober 1560 in Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, England Sir George Moore I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Bethersden, Kent, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir George Moore I il 27 ottobre 1560, nel Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel Canterbury, Kent, England, e fu sepolta a Bethersden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Coxsuneが1540年5月7日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー スト アルフエッジで生まれた時，父Edward Coxsuneは24歳，母Joan Coxsuneは25歳であった。1560年10月27日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー スト アルフエッジでSir George Moore Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスケントカンテルブリーで死去し，イギリスケントベスエルスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Alphege,Canterbury,Kent,England: 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 알프지
ko.Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent,: 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 알프지
ko.lifeSummary: Joane Coxsune(이)가 1540년 5월 7일 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 알프지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Coxsune(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Coxsune(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1560년 10월 27일 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 알프지에서 Sir George Moore I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 베더즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Coxsune nasceu em 7 de maio de 1540, em Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Coxsune, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Coxsune, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Moore I em 27 de outubro de 1560, em Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent,: кантирбури ст алфедж, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Coxsune родилась 7 мая 1540 г. в местности кантирбури ст алфедж, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Coxsune было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Coxsune, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Moore I 27 октября 1560 г. в местности кантирбури ст алфедж, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия и была похоронена в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Sir George Moore I el 27 de octubre de 1560, en Canterbury St Alphege, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra.
